body.title: Delete the WHOLE preparse concept (router, OR path, gateway purpose, all callers)
body.intention: I intend that local_preparse.py and its use_local_preparse flag are gone — preparse routes only through the gateway/Proxy.
body.description:
## Akien resolution 2026-06-30 — DELETE THE WHOLE PREPARSE CONCEPT (expanded; supersedes T-igor-preparse-via-or-reroute)
Preparse predates word-graphs and is entirely dead. Delete the concept, not just local_preparse:
- unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/local_preparse.py  (delete file)
- self.use_local_preparse flag + ALL references (main.py _preparse_via label + callers)
- preparse_router  (the routing component)
- preparse_via_openrouter  (the OR path)
- gateway preparse purpose / gateway.call('preparse')  (the purpose itself)
- ALL call('preparse') callers across igor
**Completion criteria:** `grep -ri 'preparse' unseen_university/devices/igor` -> 0 FUNCTIONAL references (historical comments in archived notes OK); igor imports clean; `python -c 'import unseen_university.devices.igor.main'` green. The grep-gate (preparse refs -> 0) is a provable red->green; structural-delete remainder may close shipped-unproven naming the no-red-test lever.
**Scope boundary:** igor device only; do not touch the Proxy.

---
(original framing below, superseded by the resolution above)

**Akien directive (2026-06-29):** do away with local_preparse. **Files:** delete unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/local_preparse.py (raw  at :172; the 'local-only constraint' docstring); remove self.use_local_preparse flag + references in main.py (the _preparse_via forensic label and any callers). Preparse already routes via gateway.call('preparse') through the Proxy. **Test:** grep igor for local_preparse -> 0; main.py imports + a preparse smoke still green.

Part of the igor Inference-Proxy-only sweep (post T-inf-reroute-A/B/C).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Removed the whole LLM-preparse concept from igor (25 files; deleted local_preparse.py, preparse_router.py + 2 orphaned tests; gateway purpose, orphaned reasoner funcs, coupled tuning-habits, telemetry all gone). CSB classifier layer preserved per Akien -> follow-up T-igor-retire-csb-classifier-to-wordgraph. Verified independently: grep-gate 0 refs, CSB layer present, igor import OK, test 7/7. Proof @007ceb84 red=AssertionError green=passed.

description:
**Akien directive (2026-06-29):** do away with local_preparse. **Files:** delete unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/local_preparse.py (raw 'import ollama' at line 172; the local-only-constraint docstring); remove self.use_local_preparse flag + references in main.py (the _preparse_via forensic label and any callers). Preparse already routes via gateway.call('preparse') through the Proxy. **Test:** grep igor for local_preparse -> 0; main.py imports + a preparse smoke still green.

Part of the igor Inference-Proxy-only sweep (post T-inf-reroute-A/B/C).

**Survey note (2026-06-29):** also touches cognition/preparse_router.py (the router choosing local_preparse vs gateway preparse) — not a single-file delete; rework the router to always use gateway.call('preparse'). 16 refs across local_preparse.py + main.py + preparse_router.py.

**Akien directive (2026-06-30): ALL preparse is dead.** 'preparse was before we had the word graphs. all preparse is dead.' Scope EXPANDS from just local_preparse to the entire preparse concept: local_preparse.py, preparse_router.py, the gateway 'preparse' purpose (build_default_gateway entry + _PURPOSE_TASK_CLASS['preparse']), every gateway.call('preparse') caller (main.py + thalamus/turn_pipeline), preparse_via_openrouter, use_local_preparse flag, _preparse_via labels, and the preparse_search/should_escalate machinery downstream if preparse-only. Survey all preparse refs and remove. SUPERSEDES T-igor-preparse-via-or-reroute (folded in).
intention: I intend that local_preparse.py and its use_local_preparse flag are gone — preparse routes only through the gateway/Proxy.
title: Delete ALL preparse (dead — predates word-graphs)
